implementationNotes: Draft PR #33 created — awaiting Terraform plan

items.label: Infrastructure Written — Terraform
items.docNote: No new Terraform resources required for health-check-ci feature. Per SPEC: 'Infra: No Terraform changes — the environment variable is injected by CI/CD, not IaC.' The GET /api/health endpoint uses authLevel:anonymous on the Function App (bypasses APIM auth). STRICT_HEALTH_MODE is injected via az functionapp config appsettings set in deploy-backend.yml (CI/CD scope). Terraform plan validates clean (0 to add, 0 to destroy). Existing resources: Function App (func-sample-app-001), APIM (apim-sample-app-001), Key Vault (kv-sampleapp-001) — all unchanged.

items.label: Development Complete — Backend
items.docNote: Added GET /api/health endpoint (fn-health.ts, authLevel: anonymous) returning {status,mode} with STRICT_HEALTH_MODE env var. Added integration test and validate-app.sh hook for /api/health reachability.

items.label: Development Complete — Frontend
items.docNote: No frontend changes required for health-check-ci. The feature is a backend-only health endpoint (GET /api/health) with CI/CD env var injection. Verified existing frontend builds, tests (14/14), and lint pass cleanly.

errorLog.message: Elevated apply resume cycle 1/5. Reset 2 items to pending for standard CI re-verification.

{"fault_domain":"deployment-stale","diagnostic_trace":"GET /api/health returns HTTP 404. fn-health is NOT in the deployed Azure Function list (only fn-audit, fn-demo-login, fn-hello are deployed). The function exists locally in backend/src/functions/fn-health.ts, builds to dist/src/functions/fn-health.js, and package.json main glob includes it. Integration test failures: (1) returns 200 with status ok and mode from STRICT_HEALTH_MODE — Expected 200, Received 404 at health.integration.test.ts:37. (2) returns valid JSON with expected shape — Expected 200, Received 404 at health.integration.test.ts:57. All 7 pre-existing smoke tests pass (fn-hello: 3/3, fn-demo-login: 4/4). The deploy-backend.yml workflow appears correct but the artifact was not deployed with fn-health included. Needs redeployment."}

Redevelopment cycle 1/5: GET /api/health returns HTTP 404. fn-health is NOT in the deployed Azure Function list (only fn-audit, fn-demo-login, fn-hello are deployed). The function exists locally in backend/src/functions/fn-health.ts, builds to dist/src/functions/fn-health.js, and package.json main glob includes it. Integration test failures: (1) returns 200 with status ok and mode from STRICT_HEALTH_MODE — Expected 200, Received 404 at health.integration.test.ts:37. (2) returns valid JSON with expected shape — Expected 200, Received 404 at health.integration.test.ts:57. All 7 pre-existing smoke tests pass (fn-hello: 3/3, fn-demo-login: 4/4). The deploy-backend.yml workflow appears correct but the artifact was not deployed with fn-health included. Needs redeployment.. Reset 3 items: push-app, poll-app-ci, integration-test
